title: RECYCLING AND MANUFACTURING - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY RECYCLING AND MANUFACTURING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of electronics (desktop computers, laptops, computer accessories, televisions, monitors, mobile phones, video game systems, etc.), books, clothing, furniture, and electric appliances (refrigerators, ranges, freezers, washers, and dryers). Also provides recycling of mattresses and styrofoam. 2890 Chad Drive Eugene, OR 97408 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 687-5820 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 687-5820 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information, drop-off locations, and hours. Pickup is available for appliances and large quantities of books. Other items must be dropped off at the location centers. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane, Linn, Marion, and Wasco Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm, closed major holidays Services: Appliance Donation Programs Book/Magazine Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Donation Drop Off Points Donation Pickups Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Mobile Device Donation Programs Office Equipment/Supplies Donation Programs Recycling Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - VALLEY INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNT HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - SECOND CHANCE RENTERS EDUCATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - REGIONAL HOUSING REHABILITATION LOAN PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINDING PATHS TO PROSPERITY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY
